uiBuilder.label: Quote Versions Comparison
uiBuilder.description: A custom comparison grid: each version (v1/v2/v3 — records from the same table) is a column; fields grouped by section are rows. Handles tick/cross, currency, aggregation, pills, percentage, and trend. Driven by a JSON array.

properties.name: versions
properties.label: Versions (JSON array)
properties.description: Array of version objects, one per column. Each: { header:{title,option,status,selectable,versionId}, sections:[{sectionName,type,fields:[{label,value,displayType,formatted,...}]}], actions:[{key,label,style}] }. Set header.versionId (e.g. the sys_id) so VERSION_SELECTED/ACTION_CLICKED can identify WHICH version; give each action a stable key (clone/view/copy/send) to branch on. The first version defines the rows; bind a data resource with your v1/v2/v3 records.

properties.name: title
properties.label: Title
properties.description: Fallback title shown if the first version has no header.title.

properties.name: labelWidth
properties.label: Label column width
properties.description: CSS width of the left (field-label) column, e.g. 200px or 16rem.

actions.name: VERSION_SELECTED
actions.label: Version selected
actions.description: Fired when a column's Select checkbox changes. Payload: { index, versionId, option, checked }.

payload.name: index
payload.label: Column index
payload.description: Zero-based index of the version column.

payload.name: versionId
payload.label: Version id
payload.description: Stable id of the version (header.versionId or header.id); use this to identify the record, not the index.

payload.name: option
payload.label: Option label
payload.description: The version's display label, e.g. 'Option 2 v: 2.0'.

payload.name: checked
payload.label: Checked
payload.description: Whether the Select checkbox is checked.

actions.name: ACTION_CLICKED
actions.label: Action clicked
actions.description: Fired when a footer action button is clicked. Payload: { index, versionId, option, action }.

payload.name: index
payload.label: Column index
payload.description: Zero-based index of the version column.

payload.name: versionId
payload.label: Version id
payload.description: Stable id of the version (header.versionId or header.id); use this to know WHICH version's button was clicked, not the index.

payload.name: option
payload.label: Option label
payload.description: The version's display label, e.g. 'Option 2 v: 2.0'.

payload.name: action
payload.label: Action key
payload.description: The clicked button's stable key (action.key) or its label if no key. Branch on this: clone / view / copy / send.
